'''鈭歞-g-w-r''' ('''kadagweroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyberstalk|cyberstalk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-g-w-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyberstalk|cyberstalk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-g-w-r
|-
! Lemma
| kadagweroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidagweroko|thidagweroko]] || [[word:jidagweroko|jidagweroko]] || [[word:shidagweroko|shidagweroko]] || [[word:kidagweroko|kidagweroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudagweroko|thuthudagweroko]] || [[word:jujudagweroko|jujudagweroko]] || [[word:shushudagweroko|shushudagweroko]] || [[word:kukudagweroko|kukudagweroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudagweroko|thudagweroko]] || [[word:judagweroko|judagweroko]] || [[word:shudagweroko|shudagweroko]] || [[word:kudagweroko|kudagweroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudagweroko|thudagweroko]] || [[word:judagweroko|judagweroko]] || [[word:shudagweroko|shudagweroko]] || [[word:kudagweroko|kudagweroko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dagweroko|dagweroko]] || [[word:dagweroko|dagweroko]] || [[word:dagweroko|dagweroko]] || [[word:dagweroko|dagweroko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadagweroko|thathadagweroko]] || [[word:jajadagweroko|jajadagweroko]] || [[word:shashadagweroko|shashadagweroko]] || [[word:kakadagweroko|kakadagweroko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
